data.body:
## Incident Overview
GitHub Actions alpine-busybox CI downloads the repo as a tarball (no .git directory).
tests/lib/git-fixtures.sh line 89 resolves _GIT_FIXTURE_REPO_ROOT via `git rev-parse --show-toplevel`, which returns empty in a non-git environment.
With _GIT_FIXTURE_REPO_ROOT empty, _ticket_script resolves to /plugins/dso/scripts/ticket (does not exist), so the ticket init check fails and ticket init is never run.
Result: all test repos are uninitialized; ticket create returns empty IDs; B1-B4, C1-C10 tests all fail.

Root cause: line 89 lacks GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1 and GITHUB_WORKSPACE fallback.
Fix: add env var + multi-fallback pattern matching tests/scripts/test-ticket-platform-compat.sh lines 22-23.
